feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Disassembly production order create again actual production order SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understanding and any kind of linking between actual production order and it's Disassembly production order ? 

How we can get information like this is our actual original production order and against this we have created this Disassembly production order.

Disassembly production order, SAP Business One, Production Order

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: SAP Business One API Gateway | Report orientation
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'm faced with the following problem: when I receive a report via the Gateway API in base64 format, the file comes in vertical orientation (portrait), while I need landscape format, which is set in the Page Setup in the report. Is there any way to fix this?

I would be grateful for any advice!

entry.title: Folder sharing SAP B1 Cloud control center
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Could you provide any advice or best practices on setting up restrictions or managing folder access for each reseller in the SAP B1 Cloud Control Center? Specifically, I’d appreciate guidance on how to efficiently control permissions and ensure data segregation for different resellers.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Priority field use into Production Order Screen SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understanding on the use of Priority field and Routing Date calculation field. 

Attachment image is for your reference purpose.

 

SAP Business One, SBO, B1, Priority field into Production Order

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Reg: Closing open sale orders by DTW in SAP Business one.!!!
entry.content:
SAP Business OneSAP Business One, version for SAP HANA 

Hi Experts,

Is it possible to close massive open sale orders by DTW. One of my client is having massive open sale orders to be closed.As the volume of data is higher and moreover it requires much time if we use the open items list by default.

Kindly let me know any possible solutions for this case.

With Regards,

Revathy

entry.title: SAP Business One Sales - Services App - How to configure in SQL
entry.content:
Hello there.

Since patch 10.0 FP2022 or similar, native Sales and Services apps for both Android and iOS can be used in SQL Server installations.

I have tried to find documentation on how to configure it or where, but I can't find anything clear about it.

It only uses the integration frameword - B1iServer entry called B1A Server and that the same certificate generated in the mobile App that we knew until now would be valid.

Does anyone have any document or link to documentation to know what needs to be parameterized or configured to be able to use them on a SQL Server system?

From what I have read, it uses the service layer or needs it to be active, but it is not clear to me what needs to be configured, or where, or how.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Withholding tax table taxable amount error
entry.content:
hi,

here in mexico there are multiple wtax for invoicing, when we need to update the watx table sap is giving an error that the taxable amount on every line should not exceed the base amount of the invoice, the problem is that in order to calculate the correct wtax amount the taxable amount needs to be 100% of the base amount on every line

 

 
 

 

what is the logic in sap b1 to not let us save the invoice if the taxable amount of every line is greater that the invoice amount?

hope you can help

thanks

entry.title: SAP Business One Electronic Document Service missing two protocols for AvalaraTaxRateProviderClient
entry.content:
SAP Business One Powered by SQL SAP Business One v10 FP240 HF1 trying to get Avalara Tax Rates service working and the protocol connectors were missing after installation of the Electronic Document Service.

 

I reviewed SAP Note 2952067 which discusses editing the appsettings.json file to enable the relevant protocol.  I have copied the original and edited files into the question.  In both files you see the two protocols required: AvalaraTaxRateProviderClient-1 and TaxRateCache-1 in the json files but they do not come with a parameter of Active = True or false.   I tried to add it, but when I did the EDS Dashboard would not launch, so clearly I do not know how to edit.

Any guidance available?  @ANKIT_CHAUHAN

entry.title: SAP B1 Web client does not show print layout same as SAP Client
entry.content:
Dear SAP Export,

Now I am testing the Web Client (SAP 10.0 FP2111) and I found when I preview print report on Web Client. The layout list that shows on Web Client has less than SAP Client. I did not see the layout that I wanna preview in the layout list on Web Client. 

How do I make the layout list show on Web Client same as SAP Client?

Best regards,
Siripong

entry.title: change to Chart of Accounts Template
entry.content: Hello, How do I change to Chart of Accounts Template. Company Details > Basic Initialization > Chart of Accounts Template --> CATR. But this field is read-only and I can't change it. Can you please help?

entry.title: How many user use Single SAP ID at same time SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

How many user use Single SAP ID at same time SAP Business One?  How can we set sap license so multiple user can use single SAP ID.

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Without Use of Forecast MRP is working fine SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Without use of Forecast , MRP is also working fine and Using Forecast MRP is also giving same result.

Why we can use forecast?  Is this compulsory to use? 

Forecast, MRP, SAP Business One

regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: HANA database Restore on MS SQL Server
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We have clouds SAP HANA and I want to restore SAP HANA to SQL Server.
Honestly I don't know where to start and which folder or files in their that I am going to use for importing.
Hopefully someone could help me.
Thanks in advance
Sajid Islam

entry.content:
Dear all,

How we can start to develop the dashboard into SQL SAP Business One? What are the steps to create dashboard?

Nikunj

Dear all,

What is the use of .mdf file OR .ldf file into SSMS? What is the use of it?

Nikunj

Nikunj

entry.title: MRP for Jobworker in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello,
I want to run an MRP for Jobwork where I am giving raw material to the Jobworker and receive Finished Goods. I am trying to run a scenario where  I am getting recommendations only for the purchase order of the Finished Goods from Jobworker but I also need to procure the Raw material required to make this Finished Good and make semi finished goods made inhouse that we send to the jobworker
Please help.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Understanding on Resource Capacity SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear all,

Need to understanding on  Resource Capacity SAP Business One. 

What is Time per Resource Units? and Where it is used?

What is Res. Units per Time Period? and Where it is used?

How Daily Capacity Factors works? 

Regards,

Nikunj Mehta

entry.title: Attachments2 using HttpClient and C#
entry.content:
Hi. Based on 

  • Postman tool OK
  • .NET B1SLayer OK
  • .NET System.Net.Http.HttpClient Failed

Assuming that the login has been previously performed with the SAPclient object. The Attachments2 method doesn't work with HttpClient in C#. Please see:

var res = "";
var content = new MultipartContent();
var outputFile = new StreamContent(new MemoryStream(File.ReadAllBytes("C:\\Users\\Jorge\\Postman\\files\\helloworld.txt)));

outputFile.Headers.Add("Content-Disposition", $"form-data; name=\"files\"; filename=\"helloworld.txt\"");
outputFile.Headers.Add("Content-Type", "application/octet-stream");
content.Add(outputFile);
var boundary = content.Headers.ContentType!.Parameters.First(o => o.Name.Equals("boundary", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
boundary.Value = boundary.Value!.Replace("\"", string.Empty);

var response = await SAPclient.PostAsync("https://mycompany.com:50000/b1s/v1/Attachments2", content);
if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode == true && response.StatusCode == HttpStatusCode.Created)
{
Attachments2Response? resA = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<Attachments2Response>();
res = resA!.AbsoluteEntry.ToString(); 
}

The Response: StatusCode: 400, ReasonPhrase: 'Bad Request', Version: 1.1, Content: System.Net.Http.HttpConnectionResponseContent, Headers:
{
Date: Thu, 12 Sep 2024 20:46:02 GMT
Server: Apache/2.4.54 (Unix)
DataServiceVersion: 3.0
Vary: Accept-Encoding
Connection: close
Transfer-Encoding: chunked
Content-Type: application/json;charset=utf-8
}}

Why and how to fix it?

Thanks.

Jorge

entry.title: Problems with the Message Summary Alerts window
entry.content:
Hi

SAP Business One 10.0 version for SAP HANA (10.00.150) FP 2102 (64-bit)

A user minimizes the Messages and Alerts window and continues working in Sap.

After a few minutes it returns to the messages and alerts window (maximize).
this one appears with a white screen.

The problem only occurs for one user (30 users on the company)

Any suggestion ?
